sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let's systematically explore green dot positions
# Current green dot: rows 42-43, cols 10-11
# Container: rows 38-43, cols 8-13

# First, let's check the full left panel state
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("Full left panel (rows 15-45):")
for r in range(15, 45):
    row_str = ascii_lines[r][5:25]
    if any(c not in 'c' for c in row_str):
        print(f"  Row {r}: {row_str}")

# Let's try moving green dot to different positions
# Try UP twice to get to rows 38-39
result = action(['UP', 'UP'])
print(f"\nAfter UP UP: green dot position?")
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  Green dot: rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
        print(f"  Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")

# Try LEFT to get to cols 8-9
result = action(['LEFT'])
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"\nAfter LEFT: Green dot: rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
        print(f"  Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")

# Try RIGHT to get to cols 10-11
result = action(['RIGHT'])
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"\nAfter RIGHT: Green dot: rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
        print(f"  Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")

# Try RIGHT again to get to cols 12-13
result = action(['RIGHT'])
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"\nAfter RIGHT: Green dot: rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
        print(f"  Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
